evals.prompt: Search my research findings about 'update propagation' using the index at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/_meta/sample-session/research-index.json and write the matching results to `results-1.md`.
evals.expected_output: results-1.md contains exactly the copier finding (kg-copier-0001) whose title includes 'update propagation', and does not include the cookiecutter or distribution findings.

deterministic_checks.description: Output file results-1.md was created
The copier finding (sole entry whose title/tags contain 'update propagation') is present
The matching title phrase from the copier finding appears in the output
The cookiecutter finding (title and tags contain no 'update propagation') is absent
The distribution finding (title and tags contain no 'update propagation') is absent

expectations: Exactly one finding is returned: the Copier finding about update propagation to instantiated projects.
The footer line reports 1 matching finding (e.g. 'Showing 1 of 3 findings').
The result is formatted with title, namespace/dimension, verdict, tags, and id fields per the skill output spec.

evals.prompt: Find all research findings tagged 'decision' in the index at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/_meta/sample-session/research-index.json and write the results to `results-2.md`.
evals.expected_output: results-2.md contains only distribution-0003 (the sole finding tagged 'decision'), and does not include the cookiecutter or copier findings.

deterministic_checks.description: Output file results-2.md was created
The distribution finding (sole bearer of the 'decision' tag) is present
The title phrase unique to the distribution finding appears in the output
The dimension 'trajectory' from the distribution finding appears in the output
The cookiecutter finding (no 'decision' tag) is absent
The copier finding (no 'decision' tag) is absent

expectations: Exactly one finding is returned: the trajectory-dimension finding about living templates being mandatory.
The output summary line reports 1 matching result.
The result shows tags that include 'decision' and verdict 'survived'.

evals.prompt: Search the research index at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/_meta/sample-session/research-index.json for all findings tagged 'template-engine' and write the results to `results-3.md`.
evals.expected_output: results-3.md contains both cookiecutter-0002 and copier-0001 findings (both tagged 'template-engine'), and excludes distribution-0003 (tagged 'decision' and 'distribution', not 'template-engine').

deterministic_checks.description: Output file results-3.md was created
The cookiecutter finding (tagged template-engine) is present
The copier finding (tagged template-engine) is present
The cookiecutter finding's title phrase 'one-time snapshot' appears in the output
The distribution finding (tagged 'decision' and 'distribution', not 'template-engine') is absent

expectations: Exactly two findings are returned: cookiecutter-0002 and copier-0001.
The output summary line reports 2 matching findings.
No finding from dimension 'trajectory' appears — the distribution finding is completely absent.

evals.prompt: What research findings do I have with dimension 'technical'? Search the index at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/_meta/sample-session/research-index.json and write the results to `results-4.md`.
evals.expected_output: results-4.md contains only copier-0001 (the sole finding with dimension 'technical') and does not include the landscape or trajectory findings.

deterministic_checks.description: Output file results-4.md was created
The copier finding (sole technical-dimension entry) is present
The copier finding's title phrase appears confirming the right entry was returned
The cookiecutter finding (landscape dimension) is absent
The distribution finding (trajectory dimension) is absent

expectations: Exactly one finding is returned: the copier finding with dimension 'technical'.
The output shows dimension 'technical' for the returned finding.
The summary line reports 1 matching finding.

evals.prompt: List all research findings in the index at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/_meta/sample-session/research-index.json that have verdict 'survived' and write the results to `results-5.md`.
evals.expected_output: results-5.md contains all three findings (every entry has verdict 'survived'): cookiecutter-0002, copier-0001, and distribution-0003.

deterministic_checks.description: Output file results-5.md was created
The cookiecutter finding (verdict: survived) is present
The copier finding (verdict: survived) is present
The distribution finding (verdict: survived) is present
The verdict label 'survived' appears in the output (all results share this verdict)

expectations: All three findings appear — the full index, since every finding has verdict 'survived'.
The output summary line reports 3 matching findings.
Each finding block shows 'Verdict: survived'.

evals.prompt: Search for all findings tagged 'distribution' in the research index at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/_meta/sample-session/research-index.json and write the results to `results-6.md`.
evals.expected_output: results-6.md contains all three findings (all carry the 'distribution' tag): cookiecutter-0002, copier-0001, and distribution-0003.

deterministic_checks.description: Output file results-6.md was created
The cookiecutter finding (tagged distribution) is present
The copier finding (tagged distribution) is present
The distribution finding (tagged distribution) is present
The footer line confirms all 3 findings were returned

expectations: All three findings appear since every index entry carries the 'distribution' tag.
The output summary line reports 3 matching findings.
Results span multiple dimensions (landscape, technical, trajectory) confirming the tag crosses dimension boundaries.

evals.prompt: Show me an index summary of the research at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/_meta/sample-session/research-index.json (invoke the search skill with no filter arguments) and write the resulting JSON summary to `summary.json` (raw JSON, not a markdown code block).
evals.expected_output: summary.json is valid JSON with fields: count (integer 3), by_dimension (array of 3 objects, one per dimension), by_verdict (array with 1 entry for 'survived'), and namespaces (array with 1 namespace string).

deterministic_checks.description: Output file summary.json was created
summary.json contains valid JSON
The index count field equals 3
by_dimension grouping is present
by_dimension has 3 entries (landscape, technical, trajectory)
by_verdict grouping is present
by_verdict contains a 'survived' entry
namespaces array is present
namespaces has 1 entry (harness/example-topic is the only namespace in the index)

expectations: The JSON structure matches the skill's jq template: top-level fields count, by_dimension, by_verdict, namespaces.
by_dimension has exactly 3 entries, one each for 'landscape', 'technical', and 'trajectory'.
by_verdict has exactly 1 entry for 'survived' with count 3 (all findings share this verdict).
